eventDetail.seeDetailsBelow: Check below for full details in {{fields}}
eventDetail.noPayload: No payload captured for this event.

eventFilters.noResults: No events match the current filters

help.title: About events, filters, and grouping
help.subtitle: Unlock deeper insights: badges, lifecycles, and filter mechanics explained.
help.valueStatusDesc: Preset shortcut that expands to event_type values (Working → PreToolUse, Completed → Stop/SubagentStop/Compaction, ...).
help.valueEventTypeDesc: Raw event_type strings from the DB. Pulled from /api/events/facets.
help.valueToolNameDesc: tool_name values currently in the DB (Bash, Edit, Read, Grep, mcp__... tools). Pulled from /api/events/facets.
help.valueAgentIdDesc: Full agent UUIDs (main + subagents). Select one or more to scope to specific agents.
help.valueSessionIdDesc: Session UUIDs. Typically you'd navigate to /sessions/:id instead, but this lets you intersect multiple sessions.
help.valueSearchDesc: Substring match on summary, tool_name, and the raw JSON payload. Debounced 300ms.
help.valueDateRangeDesc: ISO datetime lower/upper bounds on the event's created_at.
help.statusesIntro: Status is derived from event_type. It's what you see on each row.
help.statusWorkingDesc: Agent started a tool call (PreToolUse). The tool is about to run.
help.statusConnectedDesc: Tool call completed and returned a result (PostToolUse).
help.statusCompletedDesc: Turn or lifecycle boundary (Stop, SubagentStop, Compaction).
help.statusIdleDesc: Lifecycle or metadata (Notification, TurnDuration, SessionStart, SessionEnd).
help.lifecycleDesc: A typical tool call emits two events sharing the same tool_use_id:
help.filterTip1: Filters compose with AND across categories. Within one category, multi-select is OR.
help.filterTip2: Status is a shortcut that expands to event_type values (Working → PreToolUse, Completed → Stop/SubagentStop/Compaction, ...). Status + Event type compose as OR on event_type.
help.filterTipGrouping: Grouping tip: a grouped row needs both Pre and Post events. If you filter by Status, pick Working + Connected together to keep pairs intact — otherwise a group will only show half of the call.
help.filterTip3: Text search matches summary, tool_name, and the raw payload (data column).
help.filterTip4: Date range applies to each event's created_at.
